_comment: Bridge-side OpenClaw client config (2026.6.x). `openclaw agent --agent main` (spawned by ui/bridge.mjs) routes to the gateway CONTAINER via OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_URL + OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN (set in docker-compose.yml). We only declare the remote MODE here; putting an http:// url in this file made openclaw derive a plaintext ws:// target and reject it -- the env var drives the target instead.
